since_last: 26% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.50%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 26% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.67% · BTC +2.65% · Gold +1.31% · Nasdaq100 -2.32%. 26% of 89 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.50%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.50%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -7.84%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TER is the standout at -14.58%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +9.87%, ADBE +4.90%, ADBE +4.90%, ISRG +4.65%, AAPL +4.62%. Laggards: TER -14.58%, KLAC -13.68%, CEVA -11.91%, LRCX -11.68%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.29% at $157.08
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.29% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
